ItacPersonItem.Notes: A Venetian nobleman, he founded the Accademia dei Vivi in Rethymno, where he delivered the oration: `Orazione recitata nell`Accad. dei Vivi il 4 gennaio 1561`, is in ms copy in Biblioteca Universitaria di Padova: ms. n. 64, cc. 68-79. See the entry in DBI for his biography.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
